name: Asian Green Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound long green beans, trimmed, cooked, and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked green beans with the crushed red pepper flakes.
2. Add rice vinegar, chopped garlic, olive oil, and sesame oil to the bowl. Mix well.
3. Add the cherry tomatoes and crushed toasted peanuts. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Season the salad with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve at room temperature.
